A.text: expands as well but remains intact, keeping the gas inside

B.text: is pulled inward toward the center

C.text: ruptures, allowing the gas to escape freely

D.text: dissolves and mixes with the gas

parsed.answer_value: expands as well but remains intact, keeping the gas inside
parsed.rationale: The outer shell is semi-transparent and appears to be a barrier that contains the internal structures. As the red internal gas expands, the outer shell also expands but maintains its integrity, suggesting it remains intact and keeps the gas inside.
